name: Analytical path speedup vs OLTP engine (real S3)
claim: On a 1M-row aggregate (count + avg + sum-of-lengths) with GROUP BY across 10 Parquet files on real S3, DuckDB beats DataFusion by at least 1.5x. v0.1 limitation: DuckDB requires a LocalFS root; analytical-over-S3 needs httpfs wiring (v0.2). The card flips green when that lands.

details.v01_limitation: basin-analytical requires local_fs_root; DuckDB httpfs is v0.2
